title: The Soldier's Wish
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the soldier's wish, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Colosseum Audience, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: suiel- man's on the move!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Go to Hell, Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The hero of the DIAs naval Battle is now pursued by countries as a war criminal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's the ter- rifying man- slayer who roams about through the underworld!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Chop her head off, Suleiman!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But he's not showing much vitality with that stance,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All the killing I did, I did for my country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I love my home country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A-class war criminal from the Dias naval Battle: Head-Shop- per Suleiman

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Almost as if he were a ghost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But what of you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even drawing a single breath in a land that despises you must be painful....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I don't care how hard it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Someone needs I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't care who hates me!!

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: I just want to live with soldier-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Including the much-hated Rebecca, who's managed to stay alive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Wait!! Another man has been defeated!! Or should I say, another animal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Uooo- HH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: There are already only 30 fighters remaining in D-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The boxing lion, Agyou, who's stained the ring red with the blood of countless sacrifices...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Adventure (common) DORE OF THE YONTA MARIA GRAND FLEET: ORLUMBUS (C)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...has just been brought down by orlumbus' whip!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: So... Strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The Com- Modore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: The power- houses sub- ported by the odds...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: PIRATE: Cavendish

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...or a dark horse, going against all expecta- tions?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Shaman: Mummy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Pyromanag: Damask

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: There's still one spot remaining for the FI- NAL round!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And who will claim the head of King Riku's grand- child!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: soldier- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Where are you right now? Please don't die...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: That's all I ask!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The soldier Guy is already gone!!? Isn't he the captain!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: As soon as the Captain's S.O.P. Plan is successful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...that will be the chance to take revenge on an off-guard do- Flamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: SUMMERMAN RECOMMENT

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: So the captain took several tontatta tribe members with him and headed for the Royal Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Good luck, Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thank goodness the great hero usoland is here with us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: The S.O.P. Plan to Knock out sugar...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Will be led by you, usoland!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Isn't that the most import-ant part!!?

summary: The Soldier's Wish focuses on Unknown person #1, Colosseum Audience, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.
